message:
feat(Python): Implement 12 core CPython Python/ modules in Zig

Implements CPython mirror modules for runtime internals:
- pyhash.zig: SipHash-2-4 string/bytes hashing, FNV for tuples
- symtable.zig: Symbol table analysis with scope resolution
- thread.zig: Lock, RLock, Condition, Semaphore, Barrier primitives
- hamt.zig: Hash Array Mapped Trie for immutable maps
- context.zig: PEP 567 context variables with HAMT backend
- lock.zig: PyMutex, Once, RWLock, RecursiveMutex
- suggestions.zig: Levenshtein distance for "Did you mean?" errors
- pyctype.zig: Locale-independent character classification
- intrinsics.zig: Bytecode intrinsic functions (print, typevar, etc.)
- mystrtoul.zig: String to integer conversion (bases 2-36)
- future.zig: __future__ import feature flags
- mysnprintf.zig: Safe sprintf wrappers with BufferWriter
